items.message: No unit test failures found on main. All 16 failing check runs (mgmt jobs across packages like managementgroups, apicenter, elastic, network, links, elasticsans, sitemanager, timeseriesinsights, dynatrace, machinelearningexperimentation) show 0 failed tests. The CI failures are pipeline-level infrastructure issues ("OpenTelemetry packages not available – Geneva logging disabled" / "PowerShell exited with code '1'"), not code-level test failures. No GitHub issue was created.
